summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm (founded 2014, Ohio) that provides penetration testing, virtual CISO, incident response, SOC, and compliance services (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI, AI security) to U.S. organizations. They were an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, alongside Microsoft, IBM, DHS, and DoD.
